Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{ const body=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\)\); console.log\(''Voice:'', body.voiceId\); console.log\(''Language:'', body.language\); console.log\(''ContentType:'', body.contentType\); console.log\(''Audio length:'', \(body.audio||''''\).length, ''chars''\); if\(body.error\) console.log\(''ERROR:'', body.error\) }\)")
